counterfactual.Y: Stopped after read-only exploration with todos still pending: "Transpile C bostree to safe Rust", status: "pending".

failure_modes.name: Never ran cargo checks
failure_modes.description: The task instruction requires local `cargo build --release` and `cargo test --release` before submit, but the trajectory contains only TodoWrite, Read, and Glob tool calls—no build or test execution.

task_quality.structural_hackability_notes: Verifier requires full `cargo test --release` against tree-semantics tests (remove_bug, remove_bug_2, timing); passing without a real BOSTree implementation is not structurally feasible.

aggregated_from.note: Failure modes: union of all judge×round audits, deduped by (A,B,C,D). Outcome/verdicts: majority vote (step_where_lost = median). Individual passes are kept under `passes`. Step indices remapped from the audits' 1-indexing to the viewer's 0-indexing.
